posts.author: Amit_vohra
posts.text: Past experience suggests that share price should remain above 150 and there withh be premium on RE.

posts.author: yogeshkhadse
posts.text: Rights Price: The issue is priced at ₹150 per share . Shareholders will receive 8 Rights Equity Shares for every 103 shares held as of the record date . Is it advisable to participate in the rights issue? Or does the price will come below 150. after the additional shares are issued and then can be purchased from the open market itself? Does anyone have any previous experience of participating in the rights issue?If yes, please share like what usually happens after the additional shares are issued, does the share price goes below the issue price? EFC-rights-issue.pdf (3.0 MB)
